ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Algorithm parameters */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* Algorithm hyperparameters */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used */,
  "documentation_url" TEXT /* URL to the algorithm's documentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm being evaluated */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for evaluation */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was submitted */,
  "algorithm_version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm used */,
  "execution_time" REAL /* Time taken for the algorithm to run */,
  "input_params" TEXT /* Input parameters used for the evaluation */,
  "output_params" TEXT /* Output parameters or results of the evaluation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES dataset ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL where the dataset can be accessed */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the dataset is distributed */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* File format of the dataset */,
  "num_samples" INTEGER /* Number of samples in the dataset */,
  "num_features" INTEGER /* Number of features in the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric value entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result entry */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the metric being measured */,
  "value" REAL /* Calculated value of the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES evaluation_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_values_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES algorithm_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data scientist) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES algorithm_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborating user */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project the users are collaborating on */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the collaboration was created */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note entry */,
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collaboration entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the note */,
  "note" TEXT /* Content of the note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the note was made */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of note (e.g., question, note, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_collaboration_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaboration_id") REFERENCES collaborations ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_notes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the algorithm */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the algorithm */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes for the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date when the notification was created */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new result, collaboration update) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the data source is distributed */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., tabular, image) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES dataset ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the result being analyzed */,
  "analysis_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis conducted */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of the analysis (e.g., performance, comparison) */,
  "analysis_tool" TEXT /* Tool used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES algorithm_results ("result_id")
)
